Your defenses have fallen.

Tower Defense Mini v1

Place towers on the void. Enemies reroute around defenses. Don’t let 100 through.

Lives: 100
Gold: 200
Wave: 0

Upgrade
Select a tower to see upgrade info.
Target
Enemy Encyclopedia
Encounter enemies to learn about them.
! ENEMY ENCYCLOPEDIA
Encounter enemies to learn about them.
? TACTICAL TIPS

Click a tower to upgrade (cost 50). Freeze towers reduce enemy speed.

Drone towers can be upgraded via their base marker. Laser towers pierce.

Press Space to start or pause a wave.

Right-click a tower to sell it for 80% back.

The Nuke clears the map and makes the next wave Radioactive, halving enemy health and speed.

Use Laser and Bomb towers to shred enemy armour in 2-3 hits, making them vulnerable to rapid-fire towers.

Position Laser towers to fire down long straight paths to maximize their infinite beam collateral damage.

The Freezer tower's slowing aura is most effective at chokepoints where towers have high AOE damage.

The Flamethrower deals damage over time; place it early in the path to weaken enemies for the finish.

! WAVE ALERT
? HOW TO PLAY

Start a wave to spawn enemies. Press Space to start or pause a wave.

Build towers on the void, not on the path. Enemies reroute around defenses.

Watch and Laser towers deal direct damage. Freeze slows. Bombs splash. Darts poison. Drones can be upgraded via their base.

Flamethrowers burn targets in a cone and leave a DOT after enemies exit range. Trap Setters spawn traps on the path.

Upgrade a tower by clicking it, then clicking again. Right-click sells for 80% back.

Use the Target button to change tower priority: First, Last, Strongest, or Weakest.

The Nuke is a one-time use weapon of last resort that halves tower stats but deals devastating damage to enemies.

Lose a life when an enemy reaches your castle. Survive as many waves as you can.

J JASPER MENU
